title: Harvesting cells for single-cell RNA-sequencing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"51hrm","text":"Protocol for extracting samples from mouse lung tissue and then harvesting cells to be used in scRNA-seq. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"3ikj5","text":"Research involving animals must be conducted according to internationally-accepted standards and should always have prior approval from the users' Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC) or equivalent ethics committee. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mice were euthanized with Pentobarbital sodium Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #Y0002194 (CAS: 57-33-0)
The chest cavity was opened and lungs were perfused through the right ventricle with 10 mL HBSS Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #14060040
The lungs were removed and, using a 30 g needle, infused with 1 mL Dispase Corning Catalog #354235 with deoxyribonuclease I (DNase I, 100 U/ml) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #D 4263
The lungs were incubated at room temperature with gentle agitation for 00:45:00
The lungs were gently teased into small ( 1-2 mm ) fragments
The lungs were incubated in a digestion buffer for another 00:15:00
The resulting suspension was passed through a 70 µm cell strainer and washed with DMEM supplemented with 5% FBS
The resulting suspension was pelleted by centrifugation
Erythrocytes were lysed using BD Pharm Lyse BD Biosciences Catalog #555899

The resulting single-cell suspension was kept in DMEM Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher and Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) ATCC Catalog #30-2020 and passed through a 40 mm cell strainer (Falcon, 352340, https://ecatalog.corning.com/life-sciences/b2c/US/en/Cell-Culture/Cell-Culture-Accessories/Cell-Strainers/Falcon%C2%AE-Cell-Strainers/p/352340 ) two times

Cells were counted using a K2 Fluorescent Cell Counter (Cell Counter, Cellometer, CMT-K2-MX-150, https://www.revvity.com/ie-en/product/cellometer-k2-bundle-w-matrix-software-cmt-k2-mx-150 ) with nucleic acid binding dyes Acridine orange Fisher Scientific Catalog #AC423340010 to calculate total number of nucleated cells and Propidium iodide Contributed by users to count dead cells
creator: Luisa Cusick
